utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each item is fully specified with detailed descriptions and both monthly and annual costs, satisfying the requirement for full specification with all details. Therefore, all items are successfully included and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: health_coverage by LifeFirst, property_coverage by InsurePlus, travel_coverage by InsurePlus, and additional_services combining LifeFirst & InsurePlus. To map them, I identify the closest ground-truth items. For health_coverage (LifeFirst), the corresponding rating is from primary_health_coverage → physical_health → LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9). For property_coverage (InsurePlus), the closest match is property_protection → home_content → InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 9). For travel_coverage (InsurePlus), this matches mobility_coverage → travel_insurance → InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10). The additional_services section combines concierge, adventure, and premium membership services. From ground truth, these correspond to: Concierge Services (rating 2), Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10), and Premium Insurance Membership (rating 6).
